_note: Lightweight programmatic regression evals. Run via evals/run_programmatic_eval.py (no subagents, no LLM grading). Schema is compatible with skill-creator so fixtures + expectations can be reused by the full eval flow for big-version checkups.

evals.name: example-blockquote-coverage
expectations: pre-build gate (validate_example_blockquote_coverage) reports bare-paragraph example labels

no example label renders as a bare

outside a .phycat-blockquote after build+postprocess
解析 paragraphs render OUTSIDE blockquotes (analysis is never blockquoted)

evals.name: svg-cover-injection
expectations: first .sheet is a marked cover (.concept-map-sheet + data-sheet-role=cover)
cover sheet contains an pointing at the injected SVG

evals.name: chapter-h2-pagination
expectations: each chapter h2 (第N章/节) except the first begins a new .sheet
the sheet before each non-first chapter h2 is marked data-ends-before-lecture=true
a NON-chapter h2 (e.g. 大招总结) does NOT cause its predecessor to be marked (exemption must not be too broad)
